title: Profile time and leaks with Instruments
description: Run the Time Profiler and Leaks/Allocations instruments to locate a hotspot or retain cycle and report the responsible call tree.
body: Use when an app is slow or memory grows. Actions: build for profiling and run Instruments (Time Profiler for CPU, Allocations/Leaks for memory), reproduce the workload, and read the heaviest stack frames in the call tree or the cycle Leaks reports; for retain cycles inspect strong references in closures and delegate properties. Report the top symbol by self-time or the leaked allocation's backtrace. Do not profile a debug build for timing (optimizations off skews results). This skill exposes capability only and must not attach to another user's process without runtime permission. Validation signals include a call tree where the named function dominates self-time and a Leaks run going clean after the fix. Risk boundary: a retain cycle (strong self in an escaping closure) leaks silently; if Leaks shows growth, recommend [weak self]/unowned and re-verify rather than ignoring the trend.
